title: stelis clematis
intro: Stelis clematis, also known as Clematis Stelis, is a plant species in the genus Clematis, which is a type of flowering vine native to tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis clematis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Stelis clematis is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
